title: Doctolib - European Healthcare Booking Platform
problem: Booking healthcare appointments is fragmented across different systems. Patients struggle to find and book appointments with the right provider.
solution: Unified healthcare booking platform connecting patients with doctors, enabling online booking, video consultations, and practice management tools.
technology: SaaS booking platform, video conferencing, EHR integrations
varden_fit: High — Doctolib is the European benchmark for healthcare marketplaces. Direct parallel to Varden. Key competitor to study.
notes: Largest healthcare marketplace in Europe. Key competitor/analogue for Varden.
